channel.title: NAA Khera, SJ Baum, TJ Gluckman, M Gulati, SS Martin, ED Michos, AM Navar, PR Taub, PP Toth, SS Virani, ND Wong, MD Shapiro | PlatCOVID

item.title: Continuity of care and outpatient management for patients with and at high risk for cardiovascular disease during the COVID-19 pandemic: A scientific statement from the American Society for Preventive Cardiology.
